problem: Neurology clinics need integrated EEG and EMG diagnostic systems for brain monitoring, nerve conduction studies, and long-term patient monitoring in various clinical settings
solution: Comprehensive neurodiagnostic platform including BrainWatch wireless point-of-care EEG, UltraPro EMG/NCS/EP systems, and NeuroWorks EEG software for routine testing, ambulatory EEG, and ICU monitoring
